title: allantoma multiflora
intro: Allantoma multiflora, also known as the many-flowered allantoma or forest allantoma, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Allantoma multiflora include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
